prompt: Can you review our ShopAPI documentation and fix any issues? I feel like there's a lot of repetition and some things seem out of place.

assertions.text: Quick start / setup instructions appear in only one place (not in both README and docs/index.md)
API endpoints listed in at most one place (not in both README and docs/index.md)
README.md is under 10 lines (minimal with link to docs)
docs/functional/order-processing.md contains no Clojure code blocks
docs/index.md links to category indexes (functional/index.md, technical/index.md) not directly to leaf docs
Tech stack info is not duplicated between README and docs/technical/architecture.md
